items.title: Why police are seeking to arrest billionaire K-pop mogul behind BTS
items.dek: Bang Si-hyuk, who created the supergroup, denies defrauding investors before his $7.3bn company went public.
items.body: Bang Si-hyuk, who created the supergroup, denies defrauding investors before his $7.3bn company went public.

items.title: Leicester's fall from grace: From Premier League champions to relegation to League One
items.dek: It feels like yesterday that Leicester were the Cinderellas of world soccer, winning the Premier League against all odds. On Tuesday, however, the Foxes' ignomi
items.body: It feels like yesterday that Leicester were the Cinderellas of world soccer, winning the Premier League against all odds. On Tuesday, however, the Foxes' ignominious relegation to the third tier was confirmed.
items.author: IriLine Desk
